title: Noteblock Palette
description: Let you have an organized item tool for creating noteblock music in the most efficient way
body:
This datapack allows you to prepare a noteblock tools on your hotbar which allows you to have an access to all notes from 0 to 24 notes with a given controls that will allow you to change it whenever you desire.

 This function also includes essential blocks for setting and changing a sound instrument. let you change the type of instrument blocks at your control.

redstone tools are included as well, making it handy and compact as a tool

CREATIVE MODE ONLY
.

Instructions:

once datapack is applied.

1. go and get yourself some noteblock.

2. name that noteblock to "overture" (note : Case Sensitive)

3. place it on your offhand and the tools will appear.

4. control instructions :
Pick any item given on your hotbar

- press "drop key" to proceed to next toolpage

- press "swap key: to proceed to the previous man

for more instructions. check out the gallery or my youtube link provided


with this tool, you'll no longer manually struggle trying to change noteblock's notes and as well saves your time from searching on your creative inventory back and forth.
